price: Wer nun im Gewicht eines Stäubchens Gutes tut, wird es sehen.
arabic: فَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيۡرٗا يَرَهُۥ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: faman yaʿmal mith'qāla dharratin khayran yarahu
